Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Major distributor with 169-day overdue invoice #4460 (€18.5K); needs immediate resolution protocol.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: Large retail chain; invoice #5750 now 10 days overdue—tighten terms to prevent escalation.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: Export customer with 57-day overdue invoice #5151; export DSO baseline 6-8 weeks applicable but payment missing.

OlutSatama (Ideaosuuskunta Aito).reason: Domestic partner; 283-day overdue invoice #3837 suggests structural issue or dispute—requires investigation.

Wittich Weine und Biere AG.reason: Export customer now 3 days overdue on €3.2K; monitor closely for pattern.

Own Channels (Espoo Shop, Online Shop, O.reason: Maintain 3-5 day DSO; these are primary liquidity buffer for €62.8K fixed monthly costs.

alerts.message: Escalate invoice #4460 (€18,484, 166 days overdue since 2025-10-30) to legal/collections immediately. This is 22% of total overdue AR. Confirm receipt, dispute status, and demand payment within 5 business days or suspend shipments.
Invoice #14 (€4,540, 577 days overdue since 2024-08-14) is uncollectable write-off risk. Verify customer solvency and decide: pursue legal recovery or write off to bad debt today.
Invoice #3837 (€5,882, 283 days overdue since 2025-07-05) indicates dispute or insolvency. Contact immediately to clarify payment blockers; if unresolvable, reserve for impairment.
Invoice #5750 (€3,296) due 2026-04-03 now 10 days overdue. Send formal notice today; confirm whether this signals cash strain at retail chain or administrative delay.
Invoice #5151 (€9,558, 57 days overdue since 2026-02-16) exceeds export DSO baseline (6-8 weeks = 42-56 days). Contact importer to confirm shipment receipt and payment ETA within 3 days.
Invoice #5999 (€3,236) due 2026-04-10 now 3 days overdue. Send payment reminder today; watch for export payment delays.
Invoice #6047 (€1,747) due 2026-04-12 now 1 day overdue. Quick follow-up—this is a small domestic on-premise account; may be administrative.

Overdue AR (€82,216 / 65 invoices) is 38% of total AR (€131,931). At 62% YoY growth, DSO creep is critical risk. Implement weekly AR aging reports and DSO targets by customer segment starting this week.
Open POs (€79,996) are 39% of monthly budget revenue (€201,863). Ensure incoming stock converts to sales/cash within 4-6 weeks to avoid working capital squeeze as growth accelerates.

insights.weekly_cash_risk: €82.2K overdue AR (38% of total) plus €62.8K fixed monthly costs due create severe liquidity strain if even 2-3 large customers (Alko, Kesko, My Dear Beer) remain unpaid beyond 10 April 2026.
insights.top_action: Today (2026-04-13): Call Alko Oy (invoice #4460, €18.5K, 166 days overdue) and Kesko Oyj (invoice #5750, €3.3K, 10 days overdue) directly. Demand payment confirmation or dispute explanation within 24 hours. If Alko cannot commit to payment by 2026-04-20, initiate suspension of shipments to protect cash for payroll/loan on 2026-04-30.
pattern_insights: Alko, Kesko, and OlutSatama (combined €27.7K overdue, 34% of overdue AR) are major distribution partners; non-payment suggests either systemic cash flow stress at retailer level or contractual disputes requiring escalation beyond AR team.

Export DSO baseline (6-8 weeks) is being exceeded by My Dear Beer B.V. (57 days) and Wittich Weine (now overdue); apply stricter export payment terms (prepay or confirmed L/C) to new orders effective immediately.
insights.wc_note: At 62% YoY growth, a DSO of 47+ days (131,931 AR ÷ 39,256 recent 30-day sales ≈ 100+ days implied) vs. 30-day payment terms is unsustainable; working capital is bleeding into AR. Recovery of €82K overdue is critical to fund April 2026 fixed costs (€62.8K) and avoid bridge financing.
